mapper.select: select id, code, name_zh as nameZh, cover_object_key as coverObjectKey from sign_category order by id asc
select id, code, name_zh as nameZh, cover_object_key as coverObjectKey from sign_category order by id asc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
select count(1) from sign_category where code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or name_zh like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')

select id, code, name_zh as nameZh, cover_object_key as coverObjectKey from sign_category where code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or name_zh like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') order by id asc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
select id, code, name_zh as nameZh, cover_object_key as coverObjectKey from sign_category where id = #{id} limit 1
select id, code, name_zh as nameZh, cover_object_key as coverObjectKey from sign_category where code = #{code} limit 1
